title: stachys hispida
intro: Stachys hispida, also known as hairy betony or hairy-stemmed betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Stachys hispida include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Stachys hispida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
